I2C Configuration.name: MODE1

fields.name: RESTART
fields.description: Restart control. Read shows state, write 1 clears to 0, write 0 no effect.

fields.name: EXTCLK
fields.description: External clock enable. Sticky bit, cleared by power cycle or reset.

quality_issues: address 0x00 not found in register summary table

I2C Configuration.name: MODE2

fields.name: INVRT
fields.description: Output logic state not inverted. Value to use when external driver used. Applicable when OE = 0.

fields.name: OUTDRV
fields.description: The 16 LEDn outputs are configured with a totem pole structure.

fields.name: OUTNE
fields.description: When OE = 1 (output drivers not enabled), LEDn = 0.

quality_issues: address 0x01 not found in register summary table
